ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip ended */,
  "trip_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the starting station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ending station */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trip */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific bike used in the trip */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "trip_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route taken */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geolocation or address of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of docks or spaces available at the station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the station's availability */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (Subscriber or Customer) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the user was born */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips for the year */,
  "avg_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trips for the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled in the year */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours of bike usage */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of trips in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the availability record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "bikes_available" INTEGER /* Number of bikes available at the station */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the availability check */,
  "docks_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of docks occupied at the station */,
  "bikes_unavailable" INTEGER /* Number of bikes that are out of service or in maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_availability_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the route record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip associated with the route */,
  "route_details" TEXT /* Description of the route taken */,
  "start_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the starting point of the route */,
  "start_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the starting point of the route */,
  "end_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the ending point of the route */,
  "end_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the ending point of the route */,
  "route_length" REAL /* Length of the route in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_routes_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trend record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides in that month */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
